name: vinuni_fee_structured_lookup
description: Cases that exercise the deterministic fee structured lookup (CODEX P0, Stage 2): the program x granularity tuition matrix cells NOT already covered by financial.json, each with the wrong-program AND wrong-granularity rows as forbidden_facts so any cross-cell leakage fails. Added with the feature per the 'golden cases with features' rule.

cases.question: What is the listed tuition fee per semester for the Bachelor of Nursing program?
What is the listed tuition fee per credit for the Doctor of Medicine program?
Học phí niêm yết mỗi học kỳ của chương trình Doctor of Medicine là bao nhiêu?
